links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinereous mourner (Laniocera hypopyrra) is a species of bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. It is found in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.evidence: The isolated population is found in southeastern Bahia and northern Espírito Santo. The cinereous mourner primarily inhabits humid terra firme and igapó forest
